prompt: Enhance with labels showing average value lines for head length and body mass across both genders.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1 to add lines representing the average values for head length and body mass, along with their respective numeric labels, within each gender's sub-plot.

For the 'female birds' panel (left side of image 1):
- Add a horizontal line across the scatter plot at the average head length of the female birds. Label this line clearly with its calculated average value (e.g., 'Avg. Head Length: X mm').
- Add a vertical line across the scatter plot at the average body mass of the female birds. Label this line clearly with its calculated average value (e.g., 'Avg. Body Mass: Y g').

For the 'male birds' panel (right side of image 1):
- Add a horizontal line across the scatter plot at the average head length of the male birds. Label this line clearly with its calculated average value (e.g., 'Avg. Head Length: Z mm').
- Add a vertical line across the scatter plot at the average body mass of the male birds. Label this line clearly with its calculated average value (e.g., 'Avg. Body Mass: W g').

Ensure all lines are distinct and all labels are clearly readable and precisely indicate the derived average value for each dimension and gender.
objects: Horizontal line in the female birds panel representing average head length
Numeric label for average head length in the female birds panel
Vertical line in the female birds panel representing average body mass
Numeric label for average body mass in the female birds panel
Horizontal line in the male birds panel representing average head length
Numeric label for average head length in the male birds panel
Vertical line in the male birds panel representing average body mass
Numeric label for average body mass in the male birds panel
